subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! I bear witness that thou hast turned unto My Path, soared in Mine atmosphere, and directed thy face towards My countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی اشهد انک اقبلت الی صراطی و طرت فی هوائی و توجهت الی وجهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
